dashboard-intro.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard ✨
dashboard-intro.description: Your complete overview in one glance: clients, dossiers, lawsuits, tasks, and revenue. Everything you need to lead efficiently.

sidebar-clients.title: Start with Clients 👥
sidebar-clients.description: In Ordinay, every legal matter starts with a client. Here's where you manage them all.

create-client.title: Add Your First Client ➕
create-client.description: Let's create your first client. This is the foundation of all your legal work.

phase1-complete.title: Great Start! ✅
phase1-complete.description: You've got the basics down. You know how to navigate and add clients. Next: dossiers.

client-detail-intro.title: Inside a Client Profile 📋
client-detail-intro.description: Everything related to this client lives here: their dossiers, tasks, hearings, and finances.

client-dossiers-tab.title: View Dossiers 📁
client-dossiers-tab.description: See all legal matters tied to this client. Here you can create and manage dossiers.

create-dossier-from-client.title: Create a Dossier 📋
create-dossier-from-client.description: A dossier is one legal matter. Let's create one for this client.

client-notification-intro.title: Smart Notifications 🔔
client-notification-intro.description: Ordinay knows when something important happens — new dossiers, status changes, upcoming hearings. Stay informed without extra work.

dossier-detail-overview.title: The Core of Your Work 🎯
dossier-detail-overview.description: A dossier holds everything: tasks, missions, hearings, documents, notes, and finances — all in one organized space.

sidebar-dossiers.title: Global Dossier View 🗂️
sidebar-dossiers.description: See all your dossiers across all clients in one place. Manage them however you prefer.

dossiers-list-overview.title: Flexible Workflows ⚡
dossiers-list-overview.description: You can create dossiers from a client or from here. Both ways work — choose what fits your style.

phase2-complete.title: Dossier Master! ✅
phase2-complete.description: You understand dossiers inside and out. Next: lawsuits and legal proceedings.

select-dossier-for-lawsuits.title: Open a Dossier 📂
select-dossier-for-lawsuits.description: To learn about lawsuits, first select a dossier.
select-dossier-for-lawsuits.action: Click a dossier to open it

dossier-lawsuits-tab.title: Manage Lawsuits ⚖️
dossier-lawsuits-tab.description: Lawsuits are your formal legal proceedings — disputes, court matters. One dossier can have multiple lawsuits.

create-lawsuit-from-dossier.title: Create a Lawsuit 📝
create-lawsuit-from-dossier.description: Add a lawsuit with court, parties, and status. Track every legal proceeding.

lawsuit-notification-intro.title: Keep Clients Informed 📢
lawsuit-notification-intro.description: A new lawsuit? Ordinay can notify your client automatically. Keep them in the loop.

lawsuit-detail-overview.title: Lawsuit Overview 🔍
lawsuit-detail-overview.description: Track the court, status, hearings, outcomes — all documented in one place.

phase3-complete.title: Lawsuits Under Control! ✅
phase3-complete.description: You know how to manage lawsuits. Next: tasks — your daily workflow.

sidebar-dossiers-for-tasks.title: Return to Dossiers 🔙
sidebar-dossiers-for-tasks.description: Let's continue with tasks. Go back to your dossier list.

select-dossier-for-tasks.title: Open a Dossier 📂
select-dossier-for-tasks.description: Select a dossier to explore its tasks.
select-dossier-for-tasks.action: Click a dossier to open it

dossier-tasks-tab.title: Your Task List ✓
dossier-tasks-tab.description: Tasks are how work gets done. Each dossier has its own task list.

create-task-from-dossier.title: Create a Task 📌
create-task-from-dossier.description: Add a task with deadline and priority. Stay organized.

task-detail-overview.title: Task Details 📊
task-detail-overview.description: Set priority, due date, and assign to team members. Everything's tracked.

task-status-workflow.title: Track Progress 📈
task-status-workflow.description: Move tasks from 'To Do' → 'In Progress' → 'Done'. Your dashboard shows what's pending.

sidebar-personal-tasks.title: Personal Tasks 📝
sidebar-personal-tasks.description: Not everything belongs to a dossier. Use this for your own reminders.

personal-tasks-overview.title: Your Private Reminders 🔒
personal-tasks-overview.description: Tasks not linked to any dossier. Perfect for calls, admin work, and follow-ups.

phase4-complete.title: Task Master! ✅
phase4-complete.description: You've mastered dossier and personal tasks. Next: court sessions.

sidebar-sessions.title: Court Sessions 📅
sidebar-sessions.description: Sessions are your court appearances — hearings, meetings, appointments. Manage them here.

sessions-list-overview.title: Your Calendar 🗓️
sessions-list-overview.description: All scheduled sessions in one place. Each linked to its dossier or lawsuit.

create-session.title: Schedule a Session 📌
create-session.description: Add a hearing or meeting. Set date, time, location, and link to your lawsuit.

session-detail-overview.title: Session Record 📝
session-detail-overview.description: Document outcome, notes, and next steps. Keep a clear record.

phase5-complete.title: Session Pro! ✅
phase5-complete.description: You can manage court sessions. Next: bailiffs and missions.

sidebar-officers.title: Meet Your Bailiffs 👔
sidebar-officers.description: Bailiffs execute missions for you: serving documents, collecting debts, etc.

officers-list-overview.title: Your Bailiffs Network 🤝
officers-list-overview.description: Manage your list of bailiffs. You'll need at least one to create missions.

missions-workflow-explained.title: How Missions Work ⚡
missions-workflow-explained.description: Missions are billable tasks done by Bailiffs. Create them, track progress, and fees flow to your finances.

phase6-complete.title: Mission Expert! ✅
phase6-complete.description: You understand bailiffs and missions. Next: your financial overview.

sidebar-accounting.title: Your Finances 💰
sidebar-accounting.description: Accounting shows your complete financial picture: income, expenses, balances.

financial-overview.title: Financial Dashboard 📊
financial-overview.description: See earnings at a glance: mission fees, client payments, expenses — all together.

financial-entries-explained.title: Full Traceability 🔗
financial-entries-explained.description: Every entry is linked to its source: mission, payment, or expense. Always transparent.

phase7-complete.title: Financial Clarity! ✅
phase7-complete.description: You understand how Ordinay tracks your money. One final step: documents and history.

sidebar-dossiers-for-documents.title: Document Management 📄
sidebar-dossiers-for-documents.description: Before we finish, let's explore documents, notes, and history. Return to dossiers.

select-dossier-for-documents.title: Open a Dossier 📂
select-dossier-for-documents.description: Select a dossier to see document management features.

dossier-documents-tab.title: Store Documents 📎
dossier-documents-tab.description: Link all important files to your dossier: contracts, evidence, legal documents.

documents-overview.title: Document Workspace 📎
documents-overview.description: Keep all files in one place. Upload, open, download, link, and manage them with ease.

dossier-notes-tab.title: Keep Notes 📝
dossier-notes-tab.description: Add internal notes for context, decisions, and reminders. Private and organized.

notes-overview.title: Notes Workspace 📝
notes-overview.description: Capture context, decisions, and reminders. Notes stay private and organized by dossier.

dossier-history-tab.title: Audit Trail 🔍
dossier-history-tab.description: Every action is recorded: creations, edits, key events. Clear, trustworthy history.

history-overview.title: Audit Trail 🔍
history-overview.description: Review the full timeline: creations, updates, payments, hearings — everything is tracked.

return-to-dashboard.title: Back to Dashboard 🏠
return-to-dashboard.description: You've explored all key features. Let's return to where everything comes together.

phase8-complete.title: Complete Mastery! ✅
phase8-complete.description: You know documents, notes, and history. You're ready to run your practice efficiently.

tutorial-complete.title: Congratulations! 🎉
tutorial-complete.description: You've completed the Ordinay tutorial. You're ready to manage clients, dossiers, lawsuits, tasks, sessions, missions, finances, and documents. Go lead your practice with confidence.

completion.title: Tutorial Paused
completion.description: You can resume or restart the tutorial anytime from Settings.

prompt.title: Ready to Learn?
prompt.description: Would you like a quick guided tour of Ordinay? We'll show you how to navigate the app and create your first client.
prompt.laterNote: You can always start the tutorial later from Settings.

settings.startDescription: Learn by doing with a step-by-step guided tour.
